name: claude-hooks-worktree-dev
tags: worktree, git, dev, test, main, branch, deploy, server, sdlc, claude-hooks, launchctl
body:
claude-hooks uses three git worktrees for a proper SDLC:

- `~/workspace/claude-hooks-dev` ‚Üí `dev` branch ‚Äî all edits, quick unit tests, `/gc` commits
- `~/workspace/claude-hooks-test` ‚Üí `test` branch ‚Äî server runs here (port 8766, no --reload); full test suite runs against this
- `~/workspace/claude-hooks` ‚Üí `main` branch ‚Äî sacred, only receives clean merges via `/deploy`

**Deploy flow:** Use `/deploy` skill ‚Äî runs unit gate in dev, merges dev‚Üítest, restarts the server via `launchctl kickstart -k`, runs full suite, then ships test‚Üímain.

**Why:** Server runs from test worktree so dev edits never disrupt live Claude Code hooks. Main is never touched directly.

**How to apply:** All edits go in dev. Never edit test or main directly. Use `/deploy` to ship.
